game_mechanics.description: Game mechanics and implementation patterns for blueprint creation
game_mechanics.usage: AI uses this to understand what mechanics to implement for different blueprint types

mechanics: Particle effect: Spawn particles on use
implementation_steps: 1. Set collision: ObjectType=WorldDynamic, BodyInstance.bNotifyRigidBodyCollision=true
2. On hit component: ApplyImpulse or AddForce on character
3. Add cooldown timer to prevent double-launch
4. Play sound at location
5. Spawn particle effect

checkpoint.description: Save point that tracks player progress
mechanics: Respawn player at checkpoint if dead
Visual indicator: Spinning animation, glowing material
implementation_steps: 1. Store checkpoint position/rotation
2. On overlap, mark as player's active checkpoint
3. Animate mesh rotation around Z axis
4. Increase material emissive on activation
5. Store in game state or player controller

collectible.description: Item pickup that increases score or gives reward
mechanics: Play pickup sound and particle effect
implementation_steps: 1. Set collision to trigger on pawn
2. On overlap: broadcast event, destroy self
3. Rotate mesh continuously
4. Bob up and down with sine wave
5. Play pickup sound and particles

trap.description: Hazard that damages player on contact
mechanics: Visual warning: Red color, spiky appearance
implementation_steps: 1. Set collision to overlap all pawns
2. Apply damage with timer to avoid spam
3. Apply impulse to push player away
4. Flash material between red and dark red
5. Spawn fire/danger particles

health_pack.description: Healing item that restores player health
implementation_steps: 1. On overlap: heal character, hide actor
2. Start respawn timer
3. After timer: show actor again
4. Rotate mesh around Z axis
5. Emit green glowing particles

platform.description: Static or moving platform for traversal
implementation_steps: 1. Set collision: WorldStatic, complex collision enabled
2. If moving: use Timeline to move between waypoints
3. If breakable: apply damage on collision, destroy if threshold met
4. Optional: particle trail or dust effect while moving

trigger_zone.description: Invisible trigger that executes logic on overlap
implementation_steps: 1. Set collision: query only, ignore physics
2. Bind to OnBeginOverlap event
3. Execute custom logic or broadcast event
4. If one-time: disable or destroy
5. Optional: play sound/particles on trigger
1. Create skeletal mesh with door bone
2. On interact: play open animation
3. Disable blocking collision when open
4. Set timer for auto-close
5. Play door creak sounds

projectile.description: Fired projectile with physics and damage
implementation_steps: 1. Set collision: sphere collision with physics enabled
2. Bind to OnHit event for collision response
3. Use projectile movement component for trajectory
4. On hit: apply damage, spawn particles, destroy
5. On timeout: self-destruct

character_enemy.description: AI-controlled enemy character with basic AI
implementation_steps: 1. Extend character class with AI controller
2. Implement perception system (sight/hearing)
3. Set up animation blueprint with states (idle, walk, attack, death)
4. Implement simple state machine (patrol, chase, attack)
5. On death: play death animation, destroy after delay

materials.emissive: Use for glowing objects (health packs, checkpoints)
materials.translucent: Use for effects and visual elements
materials.masked: Use for detailed meshes with cutouts

quick_reference.jumppad_creation: SM_Cube + bright_blue material + BoxCollision trigger + ApplyImpulse + P_Sparks particles
quick_reference.checkpoint_creation: SM_Sphere + bright_green material + SphereCollision trigger + rotating animation + green glow
quick_reference.collectible_creation: SM_Sphere + gold material + SphereCollision trigger + bobbing animation + rotate
quick_reference.trap_creation: SM_Cube + bright_red material + BoxCollision damage + flashing + fire particles
quick_reference.health_pack_creation: SM_Sphere + green material + SphereCollision trigger + respawn timer + green glow
quick_reference.platform_creation: SM_Cube + stone material + WorldStatic collision + no physics
quick_reference.enemy_creation: SK_Mannequin + red material + CharacterMovement + AIController + attack logic
